summary: Tested Cierre X (shift closure) and Cierre Z (day closure) blocking functionality. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed: error dialog displays correctly with blocking reasons separated by '|'. The critical bug fix is VERIFIED - admin CANNOT close shift or day when there are open orders or other active sessions.

issues: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y warning - console warning only)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend pos_sessions.py (lines 233-284): Correctly validates open orders and other active sessions before allowing shift closure
Backend business_days.py (lines 289-343): Correctly validates open sessions and orders before allowing day closure
Error messages use '|' separator between blocking reasons as designed
Frontend CashRegister.js (lines 327-334): Correctly detects 400 status and displays dedicated error dialog
Frontend openTablesError dialog (lines 1102-1130): Properly splits error message by '|' separator and displays each reason
seed_data_creation: Used existing open sessions (Admin @ Caja 1, OSCAR @ Caja 2) and open orders (Mesa 2) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cierre X/Z blocking bug fix verified. System currently has: Admin session on Caja 1, OSCAR session on Caja 2, 1 open order on Mesa 2. All blocking scenarios tested successfully.

cierre_x_blocking.blocked_by_other_sessions: PASS - Returns 400 with user names and terminals
cierre_x_blocking.blocked_by_open_orders: PASS - Returns 400 with table numbers and responsible users

cierre_z_blocking.blocked_by_open_sessions: PASS - Lists all open sessions with names/terminals
cierre_z_blocking.blocked_by_open_orders: PASS - Lists open tables with responsible users
cierre_z_blocking.force_close_parameter: PASS - Parameter available for emergency closure

frontend_error_dialog.displays_on_400_response: PASS - Error dialog shows instead of toast
frontend_error_dialog.splits_message_by_pipe: PASS - Each blocking reason displayed separately
frontend_error_dialog.shows_entendido_button: PASS - User can dismiss the dialog
